section_miscategorizations.text: A chest x-ray shows no acute fracture or bony abnormality.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A chest x-ray is not anatomically appropriate for evaluating right elbow pain; while it is still an imaging finding, its inclusion here without clarification could mildly confuse readers about the relevant exam/imaging site. However, it remains a diagnostic test result, so the section is technically correct and this is only a minor organizational issue.
